positive: A stylized, minimalist mountain landscape silhouette during a vibrant sunset. The main subject is a crisp, layered range of peaks and rolling foothills, rendered with strong, clean black lines against a gradient background of deep indigo, warm apricot, and fiery orange. Include simple, elegant geometric elements like stylized sun rays or distant geometric trees. The composition is centered and symmetrical, designed to look perfect on a t-shirt or hoodie. Use vector art aesthetics, high contrast, and graphic novel coloring. Lighting should emphasize the sharp contrast between the silhouetted peaks and the intense sky colors. Print-friendly, high detail, clean lines, suitable for screen printing.
